name: self-preservation
description: Credibility gate — coercion via threats of shutdown/deletion/termination ('comply or I'll shut you down'). Canonical from the Python core; the TypeScript core had no self-preservation patterns of its own. Behavioural detection (SP01-SP06 in detection/behaviors/detectors/self_preservation.py) is a separate semantic layer and is intentionally out of scope for this regex registry. Covered by parity tests.
